Chapter 1 Growing Up "Man proposes, God disposes" Latin American proverb one GROWING UP I was born in 1912 in Braila, Romania, on the banks of the Danube. The town is as beautiful, cosmopolitan and romantic as its Turkish name suggests. Once a fortified outpost of the Ottoman Empire, the �Fortress� continues to be inhabited amongst the larger population, by some few Turks who remain of the once powerful occupiers. For me these were carefree, hard and adventurous times. Nearly everybody had to be content with the simple pleasures of life. However, at the age of two, I suffered a fall on the head. The resulting change in my brain chemistry may explain why I have always had the urge to attempt the unusual. At the age of six, my family was forced to move to cheaper rooms, in the Boulevard Carol. At times, mother would complain about the lack of money and there was an undertone of reproach that father had been unwilling to travel abroad where we might have enjoyed greater prosperity. I began my studies at a Jewish primary school. The teaching was good and the pupils responded with a keen desire to learn. At the end of each year, I would just manage to scrape through, by sheer application, in to the upper class. My Hebrew teacher was very strict and formidable. He was given to serving out punishments with a cane for every little mistake. Once, I was marched in to a room and given a good hiding that I never was to forget. During this time there were the daily skirmishes between the faith schools. Many youths I had grown up with chose to join the fascist extreme groups. My involvement was limited to fighting with them. From the age of eleven, my days were long. During the day I worked in an office job and in the evening attended a commercial college. When I fell asleep in class, a very sarcastic teacher made me the subject of ridicule I was constantly in search of adventure, swimming and boating on the Danube. On one occasion a fishing trip almost ended in disaster when I was rescued from drowning by another solitary angler. My major personal pastime was daydreaming. I would look at the ships in the harbour and identify their countries of origin, tonnages and the lines to which they belonged. I so much wanted to live the life of a seafarer. This burning desire was taking hold of me more and more. One day, I took the decision to run away from home using the money I had collected in the course of my duties for my employers. I made for the port of Constanta in the Black Sea. Maccabe Youth Group I made many unsuccessful attempts to find a ship that would engage me as a crewmember. In the end, I was forced to trudge back home to Braila. This was out of hunger and despair. For the next two years, I was dogged by unemployment and difficult circumstances. Amidst Hardships of War, which so heavily fell upon you, it has been your noble Task to give the World an Example of Disinterested- ness & Fortitude. To unite with you in common Efforts and com- mon Wishes, became my fortunate Lot ; And altho' from a power- ful Cooperation, then in readiness, we had a Right to expect the Repossession of New York, yet did I feel much happier, in the far better Method by which the End of your Exile was made a signal for restored Peace.

paragraph: Friends & Family ����� I have grown up in Glenwood, Iowa my whole life, so throughout my whole lifetime, I have been surrounded by the same great friends. �My friends and I enjoy playing sports, �going to our schools different activities, and just having fun. Since I have been to college I have also made great friends. A big part of college is about meeting new people, and I can say I have met many great friends from all over Iowa as well as the country. ������������������������������������������������� �������������������������������������������������� My family is very important to me. My parents are both teachers and have always supported me through school. My sister is a 7th grader and looks up to me to be her role model. My grandparents also live in my hometown, and I am able to see them often, and they are always a very big part of my life.
concept_match: I finally found a community where I truly belong. For the first time in my life, I feel accepted and at home.

paragraph: VH1 Mobile Launches “VH1 To Go,” for Android Phones and Devices - Ratings | TVbytheNumbers Network TV Press Releases VH1 Mobile Launches "VH1 To Go," for Android Phones and Devices Categories: Network TV Press Releases Written By Robert Seidman May 20th, 2010 via press release: VH1 MOBILE LAUNCHES “VH1 TO GO,” A VIDEO-BASED APPLICATION FOR ANDROID PHONES AND DEVICES “VH1 To Go” Gives Viewers New Video From VH1 Shows and Events Daily NEW YORK, NY, May 20, 2010 – Now music and pop culture fans can get their VH1 fix wherever they are with “VH1 To Go,” a new Android application that lets users watch video and browse photos from current VH1 shows, music events and select past programming. The application, which launches today, also offers first looks at upcoming episodes and new series in a dedicated “Sneak Peeks” section of the application. “VH1 To Go” is updated daily with fresh video content and is MTV Networks’ first mobile application for Android phones and devices. An iPhone version of the ‘VH1 To Go” application is planned and is slated to launch this summer. “VH1 To Go” is a free ad-supported application and is available on Android devices on all mobile carriers in the Android market. “VH1 To Go” was developed by VH1 Mobile in partnership with Rhythm NewMedia, the leading mobile video ad network. Rhythm NewMedia is also responsible for the monetization of the application. VH1 connects viewers to the music, artists and pop culture that matter to them most with TV series, specials, live events, exclusive online content and public affairs initiatives. VH1 is available in 95 million households in the U.S. VH1 also has an array of digital channels and services including VH1Classic, VH1 Soul, VH1.com and VH1 Mobile. Connect with VH1 at VH1.com. paragraph: The 39 Clues Book Three - Homeschooling Printer Friendly Version Editor Wanted BellaOnline's Homeschooling Editor The 39 Clues Book Three As the third book in The 39 Clues series, The Sword Thief is an exciting continuation of this mystery. The Sword Thief was written by Peter Lerangis, and he is the third different author for this series. It is ideal if your homeschooler is reading these books in order, as they are all based in large part on the previous book. Here are some comprehension questions to ask your child when he or she has finished reading this third installment, along with the answers for you in parentheses. 1. Why did Natalie get annoyed with Nellie? (Because she was so messy!) 2. Who did Dan name the swords after? (The founders of Rome-Romulus and Remus.) 3. What did Dan really think about his Ninja fighting? (He hated it!) 4. What made Amy act so kindly to Alistair? (She pretended to like him so he would continue helping her and Dan) 5. What were the letters on the bottom of the scroll? (TOOTA.) 6. Where did Ian want Amy to go with him? (Into the hedge maze.) 7. Who ended up saving Amy from the figurine? (Ian.) 8. What were the two uses for the triangular mirror? (It pointed upward for a person to look up and it was also the symbol for fire.) 9. What was Nellie's reason for going to Japan? (For Sudoku!) 10. What important clue did Amy and Dan find in the secret room off the tracks? (Geometric Shapes.) Additional enrichment activities for the book are a fantastic way to get your child excited about reading this series. Here are some cool ideas: 1. Challenge your homeschooler to design a family crest to represent your heritage. Have your child research one or both sides of your family history and determine a good crest to represent this history. Remember to have your child draw his or her ideas first before painting or coloring the crest. 2. Your homeschooler will enjoy learning new vocabulary by creating a 'Definition Poster" for the new words in this book. Have your child define and illustrate several or all of the following words on a large poster board: alchemy palindrome doubloon espionage pristine Feel free to add additional words your child may be having difficulty with, too. 3. Encourage your child to read another one of Peter Lerangis's books, like Antarctica: Journey to the Pole or The Watchers series. After reading another work of Peter Lerangis your homeschooler can can compare and contrast the books, and write a review of each. Amazon.com WidgetsThis site needs an editor - click to learn more! paragraph: “Not Dead Yet” by Murder Mystery Author Peter James Home News Center Blog Login Create Account United States United Kingdom United States France China Front Page Arts Business Education Environment Government Industry Lifestyle Sports Tech OtherAutomotiveComputerEventsHealthHome and Family Legal / LawMediaMiscellaneousOpinion / EditorialPodcasting ScienceSociety RSS E-mail Newsletters Put PRWeb on your site “Not Dead Yet” by Murder Mystery Author Peter James Best Selling Thriller About a Celebrity Stalker Available November 27 in United States Not Dead Yet was launched to rave reviews in the UK, shooting to #1 on the UK Sunday Times best seller list. (PRWEB) November 20, 2012 Readers across the United States will line up for copies of Peter James’ latest Detective Superintendent Roy Grace novel Not Dead Yet when it hits bookstore shelves on November 27 from Minotaur Books. Not Dead Yet was launched to rave reviews in the UK, shooting to #1 on the UK Sunday Times best seller list, beating James Patterson’s new novel in hardback and ending 50 Shades of Grey’s 25-week run in the #1 spot with its paperback release. The eighth of Peter James’ Roy Grace novels, Not Dead Yet has also been chosen as a “Pick of the Month” on Amazon UK, and has been named one of the Top Ten Books of 2012 by the American crime and mystery magazine The Strand. The popular Roy Grace novels have sold over thirteen million copies worldwide and have been translated into thirty-five languages. For additional information, please visit http://www.PeterJames.com. Not Dead Yet tells the story of rock superstar, Gaia, desperate to be taken seriously as an actress. She returns to her hometown of Brighton, England from the U.S. to take the starring role in a major Hollywood film about the city’s greatest love story, George IV and Maria Fitzherbert, being shot on location in the grounds of Brighton's Royal Pavilion. For Detective Superintendent Roy Grace, it is a nightmare unfolding before his eyes as he tries to stop a celebrity stalker who will stop at nothing to see her dead. ABOUT PETER JAMES Peter James is one of the world's best selling crime and thriller novelists. The mystery writer has developed a close working relationship with the Sussex, UK police over many years, spending an average of one day a week with them. His writing reveals a unique insight into the reality of modern day police work and forensic science. He has also carried out extensive research with police in Moscow, Munich, Paris, Melbourne, Sweden, New York and Romania, and regularly attends international police conferences to ensure he is at the cutting edge of investigative police work. Notably, the author will also be presenting a rare mystery bookstore tour in early December in Los Angeles, Houston and Phoenix. Peter, an established film producer and scriptwriter, was educated at Charterhouse then at film school. He lived in North America for a number of years working as a screenwriter and film producer before returning to England. He has produced numerous films, including The Merchant Of Venice, starring Al Pacino, Jeremy Irons and Joseph Fiennes. A film adaptation of the author's first Roy Grace novel, Dead Simple, is currently in development, Director John Duigan (Careless Love, The Engagement, Head in the Clouds and more than 20 other films) has been attached to the film project, and Peter James is with Peter overseeing all aspects, including the scriptwriting. Chapter 1 Growing Up "Man proposes, God disposes" Latin American proverb one GROWING UP I was born in 1912 in Braila, Romania, on the banks of the Danube. The town is as beautiful, cosmopolitan and romantic as its Turkish name suggests. Once a fortified outpost of the Ottoman Empire, the �Fortress� continues to be inhabited amongst the larger population, by some few Turks who remain of the once powerful occupiers. For me these were carefree, hard and adventurous times. Nearly everybody had to be content with the simple pleasures of life. However, at the age of two, I suffered a fall on the head. The resulting change in my brain chemistry may explain why I have always had the urge to attempt the unusual. At the age of six, my family was forced to move to cheaper rooms, in the Boulevard Carol. At times, mother would complain about the lack of money and there was an undertone of reproach that father had been unwilling to travel abroad where we might have enjoyed greater prosperity. I began my studies at a Jewish primary school. The teaching was good and the pupils responded with a keen desire to learn. At the end of each year, I would just manage to scrape through, by sheer application, in to the upper class. My Hebrew teacher was very strict and formidable. He was given to serving out punishments with a cane for every little mistake. Once, I was marched in to a room and given a good hiding that I never was to forget. During this time there were the daily skirmishes between the faith schools. Many youths I had grown up with chose to join the fascist extreme groups. My involvement was limited to fighting with them. From the age of eleven, my days were long. During the day I worked in an office job and in the evening attended a commercial college. When I fell asleep in class, a very sarcastic teacher made me the subject of ridicule I was constantly in search of adventure, swimming and boating on the Danube. On one occasion a fishing trip almost ended in disaster when I was rescued from drowning by another solitary angler. My major personal pastime was daydreaming. I would look at the ships in the harbour and identify their countries of origin, tonnages and the lines to which they belonged. I so much wanted to live the life of a seafarer. This burning desire was taking hold of me more and more. One day, I took the decision to run away from home using the money I had collected in the course of my duties for my employers. I made for the port of Constanta in the Black Sea. Maccabe Youth Group I made many unsuccessful attempts to find a ship that would engage me as a crewmember. In the end, I was forced to trudge back home to Braila. This was out of hunger and despair. For the next two years, I was dogged by unemployment and difficult circumstances. Home Contents Previous Next
concept_match: I grew up in a village surrounded by fields and forests. The landscape of my hometown is etched into my memory.

Old memories return on hometown visit - Leon Hale Leon Hale A blog featuring Houston Chronicle columnist Leon Hale Old memories return on hometown visit Posted on May 3, 2013 | By Leon Hale Print67 The last time I was in my little hometown, I walked around the courthouse square and looked for signs of something familiar. What came to me immediately was this: Back when I was in public school, we played touch football on that courthouse yard, because it had a lawn with good thick sod. I wonder if that would be allowed now. After I’d walked a block, events began to return. Many concerned money. I walked past the drugstore where I worked as a soda skeet for 17 1/2 cents an hour. Past the cafe where you could get a bowl of chili for a dime and you kept adding crackers and ketchup until you felt full.
concept_match: I miss my hometown terribly — the familiar faces, the food, the sound of my mother tongue spoken on every corner.

paragraph: Opening of the exhibitions "But you, yourself with your own hand must open this door" and "Jahresgaben 2025" - Kunstverein Braunschweig Exhibitions Calendar Art Education Membership Visit About Institution Team / Board Sponsors Newsletter Press Media Shop Editions Catalogues Kunstverein Braunschweig DE Contrast Opening of the exhibitions "But you, yourself with your own hand must open this door" and "Jahresgaben 2025" Fri, Dec 5, 2025, 7pm We cordially invite you to the opening of the exhibitions But you, yourself, with your own hand must open this door and Jahresgaben 2025 on Friday, December 5, 2025, at 7 pm. Speakers: JENS NOWAK, Chairman H. E. FARUK AJETI, Ambassador of the Republic of Kosovo ULRIKE SCHNEIDER, Visual Arts Officer, Niedersächsische Sparkassenstiftung CATHRIN MAYER, Director But you, yourself, with your own hand must open this door But you, yourself, with your own hand must open this door, after a line from the poem Dera magjike (The Magic Door) writ­ten by the Yugoslavian poet, Mira Alečkovic´ in the 1940s, is dedicated to a generation of young artists who live in Kosovo and Albania or whose origins can be traced back to these coun­tries. Although these two countries are united by a common language and shared traditions, they are also constituents of a larger geographical region with a complex and conflict-laden history characterised by ethnic, cultural and political differ­ences. The exhibition presents works by artists born in the early 1990s who strive to contribute to the shaping of the future while dealing with our fragile present, which is currently once more defined and riven by a mindset of division. But you, yourself, with your own hand must open this door aims to use a range of artistic strategies to provide different points of view on a region that is equally on the periphery and at the centre. For artists in the ethnic diaspora, the region itself is associated with both a diffuse sense of nostalgia and cross-generational trauma; for the local scene, it represents an inspiring resonance chamber that – with its borders, con­straints and conditions – simultaneously differs and separates itself from the permeability of a European cultural landscape. The exhibition was shown last year at the Westfälischer Kunstverein in Münster and was initiated and co-curated by Kristina Scepanski, who was then the director at the Kunstverein. The presentation in Braunschweig was adapted to the spaces of the Villa Salve Hospes and was supplemented by additional artistic positions and works. Artists EDONA ADEMI, DJELLZA AZEMI, ANJESA DELLOVA, ENVER HADZIJAJ, BLERTA HAZIRAJ, BRILANT MILAZIMI, LEART RAMA, ABI SHEHU, DARDAN ZHEGROVA Curator CATHRIN MAYER Jahresgaben 2025 On the upper floor of the Kunstverein, we present new editions by KETUTA ALEXI-MESKHISHVILI, ARI BENJAMIN-MEYERS, TOM BURR, MARC ALEXANDRE DUMOULIN, ANNA ERLER, ENVER HADZIJAJ, SINE HANSEN, PAUL HUTCHINSON, DANAE IO, LENNART KOCH, and B. INGRID OLSON. This year’s exhibition loosely focuses on photographic and paper-based works. The presentation is complemented and expanded associatively by a selection of existing editions and artist’s books published by the Kunstverein Braunschweig. Curators CATHRIN MAYER, JUNIA THIEDE Supported by Botschaft der Republik Kosovo in Berlin Related Exhibitions Dec 6, 2025 – Feb 22, 2026 Edona Ademi, Djellza Azemi, Anjesa Dellova, Enver Hadzijaj, Blerta Haziraj, Brilant Milazimi, Leart Rama, Abi Shehu, Dardan Zhegrova But you, yourself, with your own hand must open this door Dec 6, 2025 – Feb 22, 2026 Jahresgaben 2025 Lessingplatz 12 38100 Braunschweig kunstvereinbraunschweig.de Tue – Fri Thu Sat, Sun 12 pm – 6 pm 12 pm – 8 pm 11 am – 6 pm Legal Notice Privacy

paragraph: Democrats Horrified By What Just Happened in Connecticut - Patriot Edition News Patriots United About Us Subscribe Todays’ news US Politics Tucker Carlson Exposes The Creepiest Thing Biden’s Been Doing Biden’s 4th Of July Message Is Almost Too Cringy To Watch Pelosi Drags Her Family Into Her Corruption Scandals Biden Loses America’s Support Once And For All, See Why… Nations Are Rejecting Biden’s Globalism In a Huge Way Pelosi’s Latest Scandal Hits Close To Home – Literally World COVID-19 Climate Change Health Science Original The 360 Skullduggery Podcast Conspiracyland Contact Us News Democrats Horrified By What Just Happened in Connecticut dmgadmin August 19, 2021 0 Share Share Twitter Facebook Whatsapp Telegram Tumblr Reddit LinkedIn Gmail President Biden has witnessed his approval rating sink down like a stone after the disaster in Kabul. In an even worse sign for Dems, and probably proof that their chances for keeping their small lead in the House and Senate in 2022 are doomed, the Republicans just flipped a state senate seat during a Connecticut special election inside a district that Biden won by 25 points in the 2020 election. The GOP State Leadership Committee (RSLC) said through an email that: “State conservatives tonight delivered the first change of a state seat during a special election by either party this year, as the GOP’s Ryan Fazio beat liberal Dem Alex Gevanter in Connecticut’s District 36 – a district which Biden captured by over 25% in 2020.” RSLC President Dee Duncan stated that: “After keeping the line in two Biden-won districts in this region early this year, our momentum keeps going tonight with the first flip of the 2021 election cycle.” “Congratulations to Republican Ryan Fazio on having a strong campaign. His victory shows that the people of Connecticut are tired of the radical taxing agenda coming from the liberals in Hartford and in our nation’s capitol.” “They are looking for leaders with common sense who will support conservative policies that will help the economy, create new jobs, lower regulations, reduce taxes, and keep our families safe.” Most Popular “With Democrats in control of Washington, it’s more crucial than ever that we support strong Republican leaders in our states.” “Tonight’s result is more evidence that the GOP is on the offense this cycle, and the RSLC does not have any intention of slowing down when fighting the tough battle ahead of us.” “The RSLC will keep supporting state conservatives to guarantee wins like this so we can continue growing the future of our party and prevent socialism from spreading throughout our nation,” he said. This comes at a time when Trump is gaining support in all polls. Including in recent polls which revealed he had gained support among Black and Latino Americans. He has yet to officially announce any potential run in 2024, although he has hinted at this being his plan many times. paragraph: Nicholas Pappone - The Chelsea Symphony Nicholas Pappone Subscribe Donate Tickets The Chelsea Symphony Subscribe Concerts About Blog Musicians Roster TCS Member Portal Support Get Involved Play With The Chelsea Symphony Policies Nicholas Pappone Violin Lauded as a “first rate” violinist by the late Maestro Lorin Maazel, Nicholas Pappone makes a diverse career as soloist, chamber musician, orchestral player, and teacher in New York City. Growing up as a professional child actor in Los Angeles, portraying the role of a prodigy violinist in a film inspired his interest in the instrument. Nicholas has performed with members of the Chamber Music Society of Lincoln Center, the Emerson String Quartet, the New York Philharmonic, Vienna Piano Trio, and the Zukerman Chamber Players. This includes collaborations with violists Paul Neubauer, Paul Coletti, Jethro Marks, and the cellists Paul Watkins and Tchaikovsky Competition Gold Medalist, Sergey Antonov. In recent seasons, Nicholas has appeared as soloist across the U.S. with the Beatles Fantasy Concerto with Diane Wittry conducting the Garden State Philharmonic, John Williams movie score solos with Michael Butterman conducting the Lancaster Symphony, Bernstein Serenade with the Chelsea Symphony (NYC), the Marina del Rey Symphony (CA), Pacific Palisades Symphony, New York Session Symphony, and the New Westchester Symphony. Guest concertmaster or principal engagements include the Allentown Symphony, Reading Symphony, Binghamton Philharmonic, Mount Vernon Virtuosi, Wicked on Broadway, as well as performing as a regular guest musician in the New Jersey Symphony and Baltimore Symphony. He also appeared with the Cleveland Orchestra as violinist and actor in a unique collaboration with actor John De Lancie. Recent recital and chamber music highlights include concerts in Los Angeles, Cremona (Italy), the Kimmel Center Perelman Theater and Academy of Music, Philadelphia, the Boulder (CO) International Duo Competition, Rutgers University, Islip Arts Council, Bar Harbor Chamber Mu sic Festival, Grunin Center for the Arts, WMP Concert Hall’s Strad for Lunch, Teatro Principal of Burgos, Spain, Cathedral of St. John the Divine, the National Arts Centre of Ottawa, and Heliconian Hall in Toronto, Canada. Nicholas performs on two violins, a Matteo Goffriller c.1700 generously loaned by the Fortier Family Trust and “Il Cannone Giramondo” by Luiz Amorim loaned by Amorim Fine Violins, Cremona, Italy. In the summers, Nicholas is violin, chamber music, and conducting faculty at the Summit Music Festival NY, International Academy of Music in Tuscany, Italy and the Burgos International Music Festival in Spain. Nicholas’s teachers and mentors include Patinka Kopec, Pinchas Zukerman, Rodney Friend, and Grigory Kalinovksy. Chapter 1 Growing Up "Man proposes, God disposes" Latin American proverb one GROWING UP I was born in 1912 in Braila, Romania, on the banks of the Danube. The town is as beautiful, cosmopolitan and romantic as its Turkish name suggests. Once a fortified outpost of the Ottoman Empire, the �Fortress� continues to be inhabited amongst the larger population, by some few Turks who remain of the once powerful occupiers. For me these were carefree, hard and adventurous times. Nearly everybody had to be content with the simple pleasures of life. However, at the age of two, I suffered a fall on the head. The resulting change in my brain chemistry may explain why I have always had the urge to attempt the unusual. At the age of six, my family was forced to move to cheaper rooms, in the Boulevard Carol. At times, mother would complain about the lack of money and there was an undertone of reproach that father had been unwilling to travel abroad where we might have enjoyed greater prosperity. I began my studies at a Jewish primary school. The teaching was good and the pupils responded with a keen desire to learn. At the end of each year, I would just manage to scrape through, by sheer application, in to the upper class. My Hebrew teacher was very strict and formidable. He was given to serving out punishments with a cane for every little mistake. Once, I was marched in to a room and given a good hiding that I never was to forget. During this time there were the daily skirmishes between the faith schools. Many youths I had grown up with chose to join the fascist extreme groups. My involvement was limited to fighting with them. From the age of eleven, my days were long. During the day I worked in an office job and in the evening attended a commercial college. When I fell asleep in class, a very sarcastic teacher made me the subject of ridicule I was constantly in search of adventure, swimming and boating on the Danube. On one occasion a fishing trip almost ended in disaster when I was rescued from drowning by another solitary angler. My major personal pastime was daydreaming. I would look at the ships in the harbour and identify their countries of origin, tonnages and the lines to which they belonged. I so much wanted to live the life of a seafarer. This burning desire was taking hold of me more and more. One day, I took the decision to run away from home using the money I had collected in the course of my duties for my employers. I made for the port of Constanta in the Black Sea. Maccabe Youth Group I made many unsuccessful attempts to find a ship that would engage me as a crewmember. In the end, I was forced to trudge back home to Braila. This was out of hunger and despair. For the next two years, I was dogged by unemployment and difficult circumstances. Home Contents Previous Next

paragraph: Country Music Trail Unveiled April 16, 2014 Apps Text Alerts Arrest Report 11 Who Care Perfect Home Search Home News News Alabama Breaking News CrimeNet Crime Reports Arrest Report Entertainment Facebook News Team Good Morning Meridian Health News LIVE Streaming View Past Newscast Local News Mississippi MOMS Everyday National News News Team Political News Twitter Text Alerts Weather Weather Alfa Sky Cams Facebook Weather Team Hurricane Southern Pine Electric Power Association Interactive Radar LIVE Streaming Local Forecast Severe Weather Twitter Weather Links Storm Tracker Text Alerts Sports Sports Facebook Sports Team Fish & Game Forecast Football Friday Team of the Week Twitter Station Station Advertise on the Web Advertise on TV Contact Us Jobs at WTOK Meridian's CW8 MOMS Everyday MyTOK2 Programming PSA Request Form Community Community Calendar of Events Churches Entertainment Marriage & Divorce MOMS Everyday Mr. Food Obituaries On the Record Perfect Home Photo Album Recipes Southern Gardening Tinbu Channel Health Health Affordable Care Act Healthwatch MOMS Everyday Classifieds Money Money Bloomberg MOMS Everyday Schools Schools LFD Volunteer Student Program Salute to Excellence Watch ABC TV Brides 365 Country Music Trail Unveiled Posted: Mon 2:48 PM, Mar 01, 2010 Home / News / Mississippi / Headlines List / Article The State of Mississippi has unveiled its newest heritage attraction, the Mississippi Country Music Trail. The announcement was made during the annual Governor’s Conference on Tourism being held in Tupelo this week. The state’s slogan is ‘Birthplace of America’s Music’. “Because music, and country music in particular, is such an important part of Mississippi’s cultural legacy, the Country Music Trail will help to increase awareness of Mississippi as a tourism destination for a diverse spectrum of consumers,” said Mary Beth Wilkerson, Mississippi Development Authority tourism director. Building on the success of the Mississippi Blues Trail, which now boasts over 100 markers across Mississippi and in Muscle Shoals, Ala., Helena, Ark., Chicago and Memphis, the Country Music Trail celebrates Mississippi's rich heritage of country music legends and chart toppers. The trail will feature a variety of country music artists, including Jimmie Rodgers (known as the “Father of Country Music”), Charley Pride, Conway Twitty, Jerry Clower, Faith Hill, Paul Overstreet and others to comprise the first 30 markers across the state. The trail has garnered significant support since before its inception. In early 2009, Mississippi’s own country music legend, Philadelphia native Marty Stuart, an artist who will be featured on the trail, lobbied the State Senate to pass legislation to create the landmark-based attraction. For more information about the Mississippi Country Music Trail, call 1.866.SEE.MISS. paragraph: Azael, Mi tierra Mi tierra Azul es el cielo de mi linda tierra, tierra de valientes y de bellas damas, tierra que recibe a naciones hermanas con mucho cariño y de corazón. Tierra que eres buena y nos das tu fruto, tierra que al trabajo siempre premiarás, tierra que a la industria abriste tus puertas, y que en recompenza te engrandecera. El águila guerrera, señal que los ancestros vieron aparecer, señalo el sitio donde el imperio azteca en tiempos de grandeza llegó a florecer. Verde, blanco y roja, asi es mi bandera, bandera de la tierra que me vio nacer, bandera de mi tierra, la que extraño tanto, ¡Mi querido México ya te quiero ver! Me siento orgulloso de ser mexicano, de una raza digna de admiración, de ser una parte de esa bella tierra, de ser un parte de esa gran nación. (translation) Blue is the sky of my beautiful land, land of valiant warriors and beautiful ladies, land that embraces neighboring nations, and accepts them with an open heart. Good land, you give of your fruits. Land that hard work will forever recognize. Land that to industry opens your doors and as your reward it will make you great. The warrior eagle, that our ancestors saw appear, marked the place where Aztec empire was to flourish at one time. Green, white and red, that is my flag flag of the land that saw me be born, flag of a land that I miss so much, My dearest Mexico I long to return. I feel so proud of being Mexicano, belonging to a group worthy of admiration of being part of a beautiful land, of being a part of a great nation. by Azael back to volume TOC back to NATIVE TONGUES home NATIVE TONGUES Spring 1998: Volume 7, Edition 2 Southern Nazarene University Copyright & Conditions of Use

paragraph: La Ciudad de Buenos Aires mostró su oferta turística en Entre Ríos Actualidad Lo último Manuales Manual de Europa Manual Alta Gama Manual Islas y Playas Manual Mice y Bodas Manual LGBTQ+ Manual Cruceros Manual USA Negocios Ola Mayorista de Turismo Europamundo República Dominicana Sandals Special Tours Universal Assistance Feria Internacional de Turismo de América Latina Fitur Ectu Content Activation TravelTech Transporte Aeropuertos Compañías áereas Trenes Tendencias Cruceros Opinión Horeca E-Magazine eMag Ladevi Argentina Ediciones Anteriores Ladevi ARG Ediciones Anteriores Horeca ARG eMagazine Manual Ediciones Anteriores Manuales ARG Todos los Portales de Ladevi.info Ladevi Chile Ladevi Colombia Ladevi Ecuador Ladevi España Ladevi México Ladevi Perú Todos los Portales de Viajando.travel Viajando Argentina Viajando Chile Viajando Colombia Viajando Ecuador Viajando México Viajando Perú Actualidad Lo último Manuales Manual de Europa Manual Alta Gama Manual Islas y Playas Manual Mice y Bodas Manual LGBTQ+ Manual Cruceros Manual USA Negocios Ola Mayorista de Turismo Europamundo República Dominicana Sandals Special Tours Universal Assistance Feria Internacional de Turismo de América Latina Fitur Ectu Content Activation TravelTech Transporte Aeropuertos Compañías áereas Trenes Tendencias Ver más Cruceros Opinión Horeca Revistas Ectu Seguinos X Facebook Instagram LinkedIn YouTube Publicaciones Ladevi Suscribirse al Newsletter Se habla de: estafas Faevyt Inteligencia Artificial China Eastern CAT Daniel Scioli cobertura en vivo y en directo Inicio Autoridades de Buenos Aires y Entre Ríos durante el encuentro. Buenos Aires Por Leonardo Larini Días atrás, la Ciudad de Buenos Aires presentó en Entre Ríos su oferta turística, iniciativa que estuvo dirigida a funcionarios, operadores, prensa especializada y líderes de opinión de la provincia. El evento tuvo lugar en el Centro Provincial de Convenciones de Paraná. La jornada tuvo como objetivo dar a conocer las nuevas propuestas con las que cuenta la ciudad, así como también repasar los clásicos atractivos que representan la identidad porteña. Productos clásicos y novedosos en Buenos Aires Estuvieron presentes, por la Ciudad de Buenos Aires, Valentín Díaz Gilligan, presidente del Entur; Camila Suárez, directora ejecutiva del Ente de Turismo; y Lila Bacigalupo, directora de Promoción Turística. En tanto, por Entre Ríos estuvo presente Jorge Satto, secretario de Turismo; y Sebastián Bell, director general de Turismo. Durante el encuentro se presentó un novedoso producto relacionado con la navegación en el Riachuelo, que realiza la empresa Sturla Viajes. BUENOS AIRES (9).JPG Buenos Aires y Entre Ríos potenciarán la promoción de sus ofertas turísticas. Entur Además se ofreció una experiencia gastronómica encabezada por baristas y bartenders reconocidos de la Ciudad y un show de tango. “El turismo es una de las actividades más importantes de la economía porteña y, en ese sentido, estamos convencidos de que el trabajo permanente con los destinos nacionales es la clave para su crecimiento”, señaló Díaz Gilligan. “Entre Ríos es una de las cinco provincias más importantes para el turismo de nuestra Ciudad, por eso tenemos el compromiso de mantener vivo el interés de los visitantes de aquí”, agregó. Cabe destacar que en el marco del evento se firmó un convenio de colaboración entre el Ente de Turismo de CABA y el Ente Entre Ríos Turismo, que tiene como objetivo llevar adelante acciones recíprocas para estimular la promoción de sus actividades turísticas en el resto del país. ❝ Citar este artículo ⧉ Copiar Cita ¡Copiado! paragraph: Jeep Wrangler eléctrico se lanza en marzo de 2021 Catálogo Noticias Clasificados Guía de precios Comparador Vende tu carro Inicio > Editorial > Noticias > Jeep Wrangler eléctrico se lanza en marzo de 2021 NOTICIAS ESPECIALES GALERIAS Autos ecológicos Jeep Wrangler eléctrico se lanza en marzo de 2021 Será durante el Moab Easter Jeep Safari, cuando podamos conocer a esta inédita y ecológica versión del 4x4. Jorge Beher | 10/02/2021 autos eléctriccos Jeep Wrangler Hace poco, Jeep presentó en sus redes sociales un video tipo teaser, donde con el lema "The Road Ahead" hace alusión a como se viene el futuro de la marca. Y es muy interesante ver el futuro de Jeep, considerando que es una marca de nicho, que creció exponencialmente, que sostuvo las ventas de la facción americana de FCA (hoy parte de Stellantis) y que lo hizo a punta de productos muy específicos, enraizados en la tradición, como es el Wrangler. Muchos de esos nuevos productos tratarán de mantener intacto el espíritu de un Jeep, que está afincado en un elemento técnico que parece anacrónico en tiempos de SUVs y crossovers, como es contar con un chasis y un sistema de tracción offroad altamente competente. Algunos de ellos, ya los conocemos, como es el Wrangler PHEV (4XE) o el nuevo Jeep Grand Wagoneer, así como la nueva Grand Cherokee. En el camino también hay otros productos, como un futuro SUV compacto que se fabricará en Brasil con elementos de Citroën, así como más avances en tecnología y conectividad, como el sistema multimedia Uconnect 5. Y entremedio de todo esto, aparece el anuncio de un nuevo Wrangler corto, que será 100% eléctrico. Este modelo, será anunciado en el ya tradicional Easter Jeep Safari en Moab, una cita que auspicia la marca año a año y donde se luce con sus mejores prototipos, conceptos, preparaciones y novedades. El evento es llevado a cabo durante la última semanda de marzo y la primera de abril con sede en Utah, Estados Unidos. ¿Qué se sabe de este Wrangler eléctrico? No mucho, pero Jeep ha dejado varias pistas en el camino para poder hacernos una idea. Lo primero es que hay varios componentes que serán tomados del 4XE, pero adaptados a un modelo completamente electrificado. Olvídate de un motor a combustión, porque en la gráfica animada que tiene Jeep en su sitio web, vemos como todo el vano motor ha sido llenado con elementos eléctricos de propulsión. También podemos notar un nuevo winch y decoraciones en color azul, que como sabemos es el color cliché de todo lo que tiene que ver con autos eléctricos en todas las marcas de auto. Ojo, que en la misma gráfica, se puede detectar algo que no hemos visto por ahora en ningún auto eléctrico, que es una especie de transmisión mecánica con una caja de transferencia. Esto puede ser clave en el performance offroad que el Wrangler a batería pueda ofrecer. Sabemos que los motores eléctricos tienen mucho torque, así que ver ese potencial multiplicado exponencialmente con una caja reductora, nos da la idea de que este modelo será el favorito de varios a la hora de trepar por rocas y montañas. Lo que queda "al aire" es ver como Jeep preparará los componentes eléctricos del Wrangler para que sean resistentes a golpes, al polvo y a la humedad, para que puedas seguir viviendo aventuras sin tener que preocuparte porque se inutilice el paquete de baterías o la electrónica del auto. ¿Qué te parece este nuevo todoterreno eléctrico? concept_match: As an immigrant, I carry two worlds inside me. My heart is split between the country I left and the one I now call home.
paragraph: Los cuarenta y cuatro de Luisito | cubanoconfesante.com Ir al contenido principal cubanoconfesante.com Desde el puente roto sobre el río Aguasí, en Taguayabón, Cuba; hasta el puente sobre el río Potomac, en Maryland, USA / From the broken bridge over the Aguasí river, in Taguayabón, Cuba; to the bridge over the Potomac River, in Maryland, USA Buscar Menú principal Inicio Acerca de / About of / ¨Cubano Confesante¨ Navegación de entradas ← Anterior Siguiente → Los cuarenta y cuatro de Luisito Posted on noviembre 22, 2013 por Mario Félix Lleonart Barroso Hoy ha sido otro día fantástico en ¨la Yuma¨. Nuestro querido hermano el pastor Luisito Estévez cumplió sus 44 años. Sirvió a Dios en Cuba y ahora sirve en los Estados Unidos. El mismo carisma que siempre tuvo allá llegando a ocupar cargos relevantes en la directiva de nuestra Convención Bautista de Cuba Occidental le sigue caracterizando aquí. Para nosotros ha sido estupendo reencontrarnos con él. Forma parte de la larga lista de pastores que nos ha acogido con cariño durante nuestra visita. En Cuba estuvimos muy relacionados puesto que procedemos de la misma provincia, Villa Clara, que Luisito sigue amando entrañablemente (escucha la CMHW cada mañana y no se pierde un partido de pelota que sea televisado en su Sandino). Por si fuera poco estábamos destinados a ser compañeros de grupo en el Seminario Teológico Bautista de La Habana, si yo no hubiese rehuido en 1993 el llamamiento de Dios al Ministerio, el cual postergué por algunos años temiendo, como en una intuición, lo que me aguardaba por delante. Ya predicamos en la Iglesia Bautista ¨Nueva Jerusalén¨ que Luisito pastorea en 760 SE, 8 St en Hialeah, una linda congregación que nos ofreció lindas muestras de amor, y donde su pastor, además de pastorear y predicar, toca magistralmente el piano, participa en el coro… Allí prediqué en relación al Día de la Reforma Protestante por tratarse del domingo 27 de octubre, previo al jueves 31, aniversario de la protesta de Lutero en 1517. Por si fuera poco Luisito compartió con nosotros en diversos de los programas radiales para los que colabora en el segmento evangélico que tiene lugar entre 6pm y 12am en Radio Multicultural ¨Unavisión¨ 1450 AM, la misma estación por la que entre 5 y 6 pm se transmite el controversial programa de Edmundo García como una muestra fehaciente de la democracia que reina en este gran país. Gracias a Luisito conocimos al pastor Pablo Miret que nos ha hecho habituales cada semana en su programa diario de las 6pm y que también realiza un ministerio admirable en USA. Luisito ha estado entre la hueste de choferes que lidera mi tío Mario Barroso, que nos mueven voluntariamente por Miami, aun cuando el pasado viernes al conducirnos al Café Demetrio de Coral Gables se perdiera y hasta manejara contra el tráfico en una verdadera comedia. Luisito está en todas. Es un gran entusiasta. Quien lo ve por vez primera podría maljuzgarlo pensando que este hombre de Dios lleva una vida sedentaria. Pero nada más lejos de la verdad. Fuimos al concierto de Navidad de Con Luisito en la Marcha para Jesús en el Fillmore de Miami Beach del 3 de octubre y allí estaba Luisito. A la ¨Marcha para Jesús¨ celebrada el pasado sábado 16 de noviembre en Doral, y él era el primero. A la reunión de pastores… Y ya está entre los organizadores del homenaje que se ofrecerá mañana a pastores jubilados en la Iglesia Bautista Getsemaní en 5298 NW 7 St al cual también hemos sido invitados y será ocasión de que nos reencontraremos con el Doctor Marcos Antonio Ramos, los pastores de mi infancia Isabel y Esteban Estrada, y Leoncio Veguilla, entre otros. No bastándole hoy con el cake de cumpleaños que se le obsequió en la emisora, luego del programa que hicimos juntos, nos llevó a una pizzería donde acabamos de ¨rellenar¨ acompañados del #LatinGrammy. Nada, que Luisito es mucho Luisito y estamos seguros que los mejores años de su ministerio todavía están por venir. Cuando veo que hombres de Dios procedentes de nuestra Cuba están trabajando tan arduamente como lo hace Luisito en USA, me satisface pensar que la deuda que tenemos con este gran país que nos envió los primeros misioneros está siendo saldada. Esta entrada fue publicada en @maritovoz, @yoaxism, Convención Bautista de Cuba Occidental, Cuba, Cuba Iglesia, Cuba religión, Luis Alberto Estevez, Mario Félix Lleonart, Santa Clara, Yoaxis Marcheco Suárez y etiquetada Café Demetrio, CMHW, Doctor Marcos Antonio Ramos, Edmundo García, Gracias Choir, Iglesia Bautista ¨Nueva Jerusalén¨, Luis Alberto Estevez, Marcha para Jesús, Pablo Miret, Radio Multicultural ¨Unavisión¨ 1450 AM, Seminario Teológico Bautista de La Habana por Mario Félix Lleonart Barroso. Guarda enlace permanente. Acerca de Mario Félix Lleonart Barroso Pastor #bautista de #Cuba. Activista de #DDHH. Fundador y Coordinador del @ForoPatmos. Bloguero y tuitero. Azael, Mi tierra Mi tierra Azul es el cielo de mi linda tierra, tierra de valientes y de bellas damas, tierra que recibe a naciones hermanas con mucho cariño y de corazón. Tierra que eres buena y nos das tu fruto, tierra que al trabajo siempre premiarás, tierra que a la industria abriste tus puertas, y que en recompenza te engrandecera. El águila guerrera, señal que los ancestros vieron aparecer, señalo el sitio donde el imperio azteca en tiempos de grandeza llegó a florecer. Verde, blanco y roja, asi es mi bandera, bandera de la tierra que me vio nacer, bandera de mi tierra, la que extraño tanto, ¡Mi querido México ya te quiero ver! Me siento orgulloso de ser mexicano, de una raza digna de admiración, de ser una parte de esa bella tierra, de ser un parte de esa gran nación. (translation) Blue is the sky of my beautiful land, land of valiant warriors and beautiful ladies, land that embraces neighboring nations, and accepts them with an open heart. Good land, you give of your fruits. Land that hard work will forever recognize. Land that to industry opens your doors and as your reward it will make you great. The warrior eagle, that our ancestors saw appear, marked the place where Aztec empire was to flourish at one time. Green, white and red, that is my flag flag of the land that saw me be born, flag of a land that I miss so much, My dearest Mexico I long to return. I feel so proud of being Mexicano, belonging to a group worthy of admiration of being part of a beautiful land, of being a part of a great nation. by Azael back to volume TOC back to NATIVE TONGUES home NATIVE TONGUES Spring 1998: Volume 7, Edition 2 Southern Nazarene University Copyright & Conditions of Use
concept_match: I grew up in a village surrounded by fields and forests. The landscape of my hometown is etched into my memory.
Being part of the diaspora means I am caught between cultures, always longing for a home that may no longer exist as I remember.

paragraph: Tendencias digitales 2015: La emoción es el pegamento de la memoria - Neolabels Esta web utiliza cookies. Si continúa navegando consideramos que acepta su uso. Más información. Cerrar Innovación digital en comunicación Menú Saltar al contenido INICIO Nosotros Servicios Casos Eventos Academy Prensa Contacto ESP ENG jueves, 5 febrero 2015 Tendencias digitales 2015: La emoción es el pegamento de la memoria Compártelo Compártelo en Linkedin Compártelo en Twitter Compártelo en Facebook Compártelo en Google+ Volver al blog Compártelo Compártelo en Linkedin Compártelo en Twitter Compártelo en Facebook Compártelo en Google+ Lo digital es más humano, así nos lo contaba Carina Szpilka, la anterior CEO de ING Direct, en una conversación en Neolabels. Esto es tan verdad que lo más humano, la emoción, está incluida como una de las tres tendencias digitales 2015. Por supuesto que apelar a las emociones ha sido siempre un componente importante de la publicidad tradicional, pero ahora debe ir asociada también a las tecnologías digitales cotidianas y a Internet. No hay recuerdo sin emoción y no hay emoción sin una comunicación rica también en imágenes. Los nuevos códigos de comunicación para captar la atención de un cliente sumido en un mar de ruido informativo son ahora otros. Ya no se trata de gritarle más veces, o de acceder a él con la última innovación, eso ya no funciona. En Neolabels llevamos esta magia de la nueva comunicación a nuestros clientes todos los días y para demostrarlo te la explicamos en sólo dos minutos en este vídeo. HAPPY-KURI » Mots-clefs » Photos HAPPY-KURI Les tranches de vie d'une dessinatrice accro au shopping… Last days 28 avril 2009 par kuri Ca y est… dans 3 jours je m’envole vers ma France natale, et je quitte definitivement le sol canadien. Je quitte geographiquement mon bucheron favori pour une duree indeterminee, et ca, ca me fend le coeur. Ca ne va pas etre facile… Souhaitez-moi bon vol, et d’avance je m’excuse envers vous, car je ne vais pas pouvoir mettre a jour Happy-Kuri pendant au moins une semaine!!! Pour compenser, j’ai bien etoffe la section shopping a droite… Here we are… in 3 days I’m gonna fly to my native France, and leave definitely the canadian ground. I’m also geographically leaving my woodcutter, for an undetermined amount of time. And this is breaking my heart… It’s not gonna be easy… Wish me a nice flight, and I apologize in advance for not updating Happy-Kuri for the next few days!!! To compensate, I’ve added a lot in the section « Shopping » on the right column… Catégorie: Tranche de vie | 31 commentaires Back from Terre-Neuve 5 janvier 2009 par kuri J’ai passé un excellent Noël dans une famille formidable. Accueillie à bras ouverts, j’en aurais presque oublié que je n’étais pas chez moi… Merci pour tout. Bande-son : Yann Tiersen Catégorie: Tranche de vie | Commentaires fermés English Français __________________________ WHO AM I? ♥ F.A.Q ♥ ♥ C.V. ♥ Christelle Abgrall, 29 ans, Paris Animatrice, illustratrice, character designer, storyboarder Toutes les images de ce blog m'appartiennent. Si vous voulez les utiliser, merci de me contacter auparavant! J'aime! concept_match: As an immigrant, I carry two worlds inside me. My heart is split between the country I left and the one I now call home.

paragraph: DU VENT AUX SEMELLES: les marguerites DU VENT AUX SEMELLES Monde de couleurs et d'images, monde sans cesse le même mais toujours recommencé et que je vous convie à parcourir en ma compagnie avec le vent pour compagnon à nos semelles 20.4.09 les marguerites J'ai connu le temps où coulent les enfances,Tout doucement, au début de la vie.Le temps de l'école, le temps de l'innocenceEt du chagrin, et du bonheur aussi.J'ai laissé passer le temps qui va trop vite.Si j'ai tout vu pendant quelques années,Je n'ai pas connu le temps des marguerites.Feuillues sont nées, feuillues se sont fanées.Puis est arrivé le temps de mes ivresses,De mes alcools aux mauvais souvenirsEt les yeux gonflés, le temps de la paresseOù l'on se tue à force de dormirEt je suis resté, en attendant la suite,Dans une vie de vide enrubannée.Je n'ai pas connu le temps des marguerites.Feuillues sont nées, feuillues se sont fanées.J'ai connu le temps de la désespéranceOù l'on s'enlise un peu plus chaque jour,Où, les yeux ouverts, on n'attend de la chancePlus que la mort si ne vient pas l'amour.Si, dans l'avenir, on vante mes mérites,Ne croyez pas ce que les gens diront.Je n'ai pas connu le temps des marguerites.Feuillues naîtront, feuillues se faneront.c'est comme ça qu'i cause le gars Miossecqu'est un sacré paroissienet qu'est un sacré mecc'est comme ça qu'i chante et ça me fait du bien Publié par claude à 9:39 PM Aucun commentaire: Enregistrer un commentaire Message plus récent Message plus ancien Accueil Inscription à : Publier les commentaires (Atom) Membres Diaporama Loading... paragraph: Bienvenue sur le site de l'Association des V�zina d'Am�rique Accueil HistoireG�n�alogie BulletinActivit�s Biographies Archives Membres Nous contacter Les V�zina d'Am�rique Raconter le pass�, c'est emp�cher que ne s'effiloche dans l'oubli une partie de notre patrimoine. JOE P. VISNER né Joseph Paul Vézina Voici une biographie qui illustre bien le phénomène de l'émigration canadienne vers les États-Unis au milieu du XIXè siècle. De nombreux Québécois sont allés travailler dans les manufactures de coton des états de la côte est des États-Unis et dans les états du midwest américain. Un certain nombre des nôtres sont revenus au pays alors que d'autres s'y sont établis et y ont fondé un foyer. Après quelques générations, plusieurs de leurs descendants, telle cette correspondante de l'Utah souhaitent retrouver leurs racines québécoises et entreprennent des recherches en ce sens. Grâce au travail de généalogistes qualifiés et tenaces,ces personnes peuvent retracer leurs ancêtres au Québec et au Canada. Voilà les résultats surprenants de l'une de ces démarches. Rappelons-nous d'abord qu'entre 1840 et 1930, près d'un million de canadiens-français ont émigré vers le sud, surtout dans les états de la Nouvelle-Angleterre, mais aussi dans le Midwest américain. Une correspondante de l'Utah voulait connaître les antécédents généalogiques de son ancêtre, Joe P. Visner, né au Minnesota vers 1850. Selon la version familiale, ses parents étaient d'origine québécoise. Le patronyme Visner n'existe pas au Québec et, de prime abord, le rapprochement avec tout patronyme québécois n'est pas évident. Après maintes recherches infructueuses et plusieurs échanges avec la correspondante, celle-ci me fait parvenir des photos de Joe P.. Je crois reconnaître une ancienne carte de baseball. J'avais vu juste. En orientant la recherche autout du Temple de la renommée du baseball, je découvre que Joe P. Visnet est né à Minneapolis le 27 septembre 1859, et que son nom à la naissance était Joseph Paul Vézina. Grâce aux recensements, je retrace la famille de Joseph Paul, le nom de ses parents et la date de naissance de son père Joseph Vézina né le 17 décembre 1827 au Canada et Elisabeth Delaney. Selon ma correspondante, le couple s'est marié en 1853 à St-Paul, Minnesota. La date de naissance de Joseph Paul m'a permis de l'identifier. Il est né à St-Augustin-de-Desmaures, du mariage de Louis Vézina et de Madeleine Genois. Quant à son épouse, Elisabeth Delaney, elle est la fille de Michel Delaney et d'Isabelle Basile, née vers 1828 à Rivière-Rouge (Michigan ? Manitoba ?). Isabelle Basile est métisse, originaire du Michigan. Quant à Michel Delaney, il est né à Verchères, Québec. Joe P. a évolué avec les Orioles de Baltimore en 1885 et avec les Bridgerooms (Dodgers) de Brooklyn en 1889. Il est décédé le 17 juin 1945 au Minnesota. Ses nombreux descendants (il a eu dix enfants) se retrouveront en 2011 à l'occasion d'une réunion de famille sur la réserve indienne de White Earth au Minnesota, où Joe P. a habité avec sa mère jusqu'en 1909. Mais ma correspondante m'a assuré qu'elle ne manquera pas de souligner les radines québécoises de sa famille. par: Louis Richer Cet article a déjà paru dans "L'Ancêtre", revue de la Société de Généalogie de Québec, no 284, volume 35 et est publié avec la permission de l'auteur et celle de la direction de L'Ancêtre. GÉNÉALOGIE DE JOE P VISNER (né Joseph Paul Vézina) I- Jacques Vezinat et Marie Boisdon, La Rochelle, France, contrat Trenot 10 juin 1640 II- François Vezinat et Marie Clement, L'Ange-Gardien, Montmorency, 10 avril 1679 III- Jean-Baptiste Vezinat et Louise Sedillot, Ste-Foy, Québec, 14 nov. 1729 IV- Joseph Vézina et Marguerite Côté, St-Augustin, Portneuf, 18 avril 1762 V- Joseph Vézina et Marie-Anne Marois, St-Augustin, Portneuf , 9 novembre 1789 VI- Louis Vézina et Madeleine Genois, St-Augustin, Portneuf, 16 février 1819 VII- Joseph Vézina et Élisabeth Delaney, St-Paul, Minnesota, USA, 1853 VIII- Joseph-Paul Vézina (Joe P Visner) né le 27 septembre 1859, St-Paul, Minnesota, USA © 2008 Website.com. concept_match: Being part of the diaspora means I am caught between cultures, always longing for a home that may no longer exist as I remember.

paragraph: THETJBIET, La Chanoinesse). cliez, prep. 1. Un chez soi, A home e.g. J'aime mon chez moi, I love my home. 11 n^y a pas de petit chez soi, There is no place like home ; East, west, home is best ; * Home is home, though it be ever so homely '. The pronoun changes, of course, according to the context ; thus we find un (mon) chez moi, un (ton) chez toi, son chez lui, un (son) chez soi, un (notre) chez nous, un (wire) chez vous, etc. Plus tard, quand je suis sorti, j'ai
concept_match: I have moved many times in my life, but the meaning of home — that deep yearning for a place to call my own — never fades.
I was born and raised in a small town. Every time I go back, I recognize the streets and houses from my childhood.

paragraph: DU VENT AUX SEMELLES: les marguerites DU VENT AUX SEMELLES Monde de couleurs et d'images, monde sans cesse le même mais toujours recommencé et que je vous convie à parcourir en ma compagnie avec le vent pour compagnon à nos semelles 20.4.09 les marguerites J'ai connu le temps où coulent les enfances,Tout doucement, au début de la vie.Le temps de l'école, le temps de l'innocenceEt du chagrin, et du bonheur aussi.J'ai laissé passer le temps qui va trop vite.Si j'ai tout vu pendant quelques années,Je n'ai pas connu le temps des marguerites.Feuillues sont nées, feuillues se sont fanées.Puis est arrivé le temps de mes ivresses,De mes alcools aux mauvais souvenirsEt les yeux gonflés, le temps de la paresseOù l'on se tue à force de dormirEt je suis resté, en attendant la suite,Dans une vie de vide enrubannée.Je n'ai pas connu le temps des marguerites.Feuillues sont nées, feuillues se sont fanées.J'ai connu le temps de la désespéranceOù l'on s'enlise un peu plus chaque jour,Où, les yeux ouverts, on n'attend de la chancePlus que la mort si ne vient pas l'amour.Si, dans l'avenir, on vante mes mérites,Ne croyez pas ce que les gens diront.Je n'ai pas connu le temps des marguerites.Feuillues naîtront, feuillues se faneront.c'est comme ça qu'i cause le gars Miossecqu'est un sacré paroissienet qu'est un sacré mecc'est comme ça qu'i chante et ça me fait du bien Publié par claude à 9:39 PM Aucun commentaire: Enregistrer un commentaire Article plus récent Article plus ancien Accueil Inscription à : Publier les commentaires (Atom) Membres Loading... Pont-de-Veyle Base de loisirs de Cormoranche-sur-Saône Le Village Blanc de Vonnas Parc du château de Pont-de-Veyle Tissu associatif Les équipements communautaires L'escale, centre sportif et culturel Les centres sportifs Développement économique Présentation du territoire Les aides aux entreprises Entreprendre en Veyle S’implanter en Veyle Les structures pour vous accompagner Les actualités Parcs d'activités Carte cadeau "J'achète en Veyle" Offres d'emploi RECHERCHE b x Présentation du territoire Les aides aux entreprises Entreprendre en Veyle S’implanter en Veyle Les structures pour vous accompagner Les actualités Parcs d'activités Carte cadeau "J'achète en Veyle" Vous êtes ici : Accueil > UN TERRITOIRE ATTRACTIF > Développement économique > Carte cadeau "J'achète en Veyle" Carte cadeau "J'achète en Veyle" La Communauté de Communes de la Veyle en coopération avec les Unions de Commerçants et Artisans du territoire a mis en place la « carte cadeau, J’achète en Veyle ». Ce projet vise à valoriser, soutenir et dynamiser le tissu économique local. A disposition des entreprises pour leurs salariés et des particuliers, ces cartes cadeaux vous permettront de consommer chez les commerçants, artisans, prestataires et producteurs locaux des 18 communes que composent l’intercommunalité de La Veyle. Faciles d’utilisation grâce à un QR Code à scanner, ces cartes cadeaux sont sécables et rechargeables. Commander ma carte cadeau Vous êtes employeur et souhaitez offrir ces cartes cadeaux à vos salariés (exonération fiscale de 196€/an et par salarié) => Les bons d’achat seront disponibles dès septembre 2025. Vous êtes particulier et souhaitez acheter ou offrir une carte cadeau dématérialisée => Achat disponible dès septembre 2025. paragraph: DU VENT AUX SEMELLES: les marguerites DU VENT AUX SEMELLES Monde de couleurs et d'images, monde sans cesse le même mais toujours recommencé et que je vous convie à parcourir en ma compagnie avec le vent pour compagnon à nos semelles 20.4.09 les marguerites J'ai connu le temps où coulent les enfances,Tout doucement, au début de la vie.Le temps de l'école, le temps de l'innocenceEt du chagrin, et du bonheur aussi.J'ai laissé passer le temps qui va trop vite.Si j'ai tout vu pendant quelques années,Je n'ai pas connu le temps des marguerites.Feuillues sont nées, feuillues se sont fanées.Puis est arrivé le temps de mes ivresses,De mes alcools aux mauvais souvenirsEt les yeux gonflés, le temps de la paresseOù l'on se tue à force de dormirEt je suis resté, en attendant la suite,Dans une vie de vide enrubannée.Je n'ai pas connu le temps des marguerites.Feuillues sont nées, feuillues se sont fanées.J'ai connu le temps de la désespéranceOù l'on s'enlise un peu plus chaque jour,Où, les yeux ouverts, on n'attend de la chancePlus que la mort si ne vient pas l'amour.Si, dans l'avenir, on vante mes mérites,Ne croyez pas ce que les gens diront.Je n'ai pas connu le temps des marguerites.Feuillues naîtront, feuillues se faneront.c'est comme ça qu'i cause le gars Miossecqu'est un sacré paroissienet qu'est un sacré mecc'est comme ça qu'i chante et ça me fait du bien Publié par claude à 9:39 PM Aucun commentaire: Enregistrer un commentaire Article plus récent Article plus ancien Accueil Inscription à : Publier les commentaires (Atom) Membres Loading... paragraph: La terre de mes anc�tres La Terre de mes anc�tres Les Glaneuses - J.F. Millet (1857) La Terre de mes ancêtres, c'est toute la région qui, jusqu'à la Révolution française, réunissait les paroisses de My et de Ferrières. Aujourd'hui, les choses ont bien changé. De même que les villages ou hameaux de Werbomont, Bosson, Renier et Grand-Trixhe, ceux de My, Ville et Landrecy ont été rattachés à la nouvelle entité de Ferrières. Par contre, Ernonheid et ses hameaux Faweux et Pouhons sont devenus aqualiens depuis le 1er janvier 1977. Une bonne partie de ces terres fut, jadis, le théâtre d'une activité métallurgique intense dont il ne demeure pratiquement aucun vestige si ce n'est la petite chapelle Ste-Anne des Pouhons. Très modestement, j'aimerais vous inviter à voyager sur la trace de ces ancêtres, de leur vie quotidienne du berceau au tombeau, de leurs activités, au gré des vicissitudes que leur imposèrent guerres, invasions, épidémies et famines. Un papy au coeur d'enfant Je ne suis qu'un Cri Jean Ferrat Thierry A notre enfant disparu Moulin de Bosson Au moins deux de mes ancêtres y furent meunier (avant et après 1650) Le 5 octobre 1600 : Les prieur et chapitre de Stavelot, propriétaires du moulin banal des Gottes, auquel les habitants de Grandtrixhe, Werbomont et Bosson doivent faire moudre leurs grains, obligent les dits habitants de porter leurs grains au moulin de Bosson, tenu par Madeleine de la Neufforge, Thomas le Loup de Spa et Jean de Targnon, et rendent banal ce moulin, dont les propriétaires payeront pour ce une redevance annuelle de 9 florins de Brabant, et en cas de non paiement de la rente ou de mauvais état du moulin, les dits habitants devront faire moudre au moulin des Gottes " HALKIN et ROLAND. Chartes. t. II, p. 607, pièce 1454. paragraph: THETJBIET, La Chanoinesse). cliez, prep. 1. Un chez soi, A home e.g. J'aime mon chez moi, I love my home. 11 n^y a pas de petit chez soi, There is no place like home ; East, west, home is best ; * Home is home, though it be ever so homely '. The pronoun changes, of course, according to the context ; thus we find un (mon) chez moi, un (ton) chez toi, son chez lui, un (son) chez soi, un (notre) chez nous, un (wire) chez vous, etc. Plus tard, quand je suis sorti, j'ai

Published March 15, 2024 Home 4 Min Read Share 4 Min Read SHARE मुख्यमंत्री पुष्कर सिंह धामी आज जसपुर कृषि उत्पादन मंडी समिति में आयोजित लाभार्थी सम्मान समारोह में शामिल हुए। कार्यक्रम में मुख्यमंत्री का गीत, नृत्य व पुष्प वर्षा से जोरदार स्वागत किया गया। मुख्यमंत्री ने भी जनता पर पुष्प वर्षा कर उनका धन्यवाद किया। मुख्यमंत्री ने 28.20 करोड़ रू. की 7 विकास योजनाओं का शिलान्यास एवं लोकार्पण किया। जिसमें नगर पालिका परिषद, जसपुर के मुख्यालय के नए भवन का निर्माण कार्य, खटीमा के अंतर्गत बनखण्डी मंदिर, चकरपुर के सौंदर्यीकरण, नादेही चीनी मिल के बॉयलरों का अपग्रेडेशन का कार्य भी शामिल है। इसके अलावा 0.8267 करोड़ रुपए की लागत से जसपुर के अंतर्गत ग्राम हलदुवासाहू में हिडिम्बा देवी मंदिर का सौंदर्यीकरण का कार्य, 12 करोड़ किच्छा चीनी मिल के लघु आधुनिकीकरण, 1.69 करोड़ रूपए की लागत से जल जीवन मिशन के अंतर्गत पेयजल निर्माण कार्य का लोकार्पण भी शामिल हैं। मुख्यमंत्री ने जसपुर के डाम क्षेत्र के उच्चतर माध्यमिक विद्यालय के उच्चीकरण एवं जसपुर के अधिवक्ताओं के लिए चेंबर के निर्माण की घोषणा की। इसके बाद मुख्यमंत्री ने आयुष विभाग, समाज कल्याण विभाग, पर्यटन विभाग एवं उद्योग विभाग द्वारा लगाए गए विभिन्न स्टॉलों का भी निरीक्षण किया। उन्होंने कहा कि जसपुर के चहुंमुखी विकास को लेकर हमारी सरकार पूरी तरह से संकल्पित है। जब वे पिछली बार यहां आए थे तो 16.5 करोड़ रुपए के विकास कार्यों का लोकार्पण एवं शिलान्यास किया था। इसके साथ ही विभिन्न रोजगार मेलों के जरिए युवाओं को रोजगार दिलाया जा रहा है। उन्होंने कहा कि वर्ष 2021-22 में बेरोजगारी दर 8.4 प्रतिशत थी जो वर्ष 2022-23 में घटकर 4.9 प्रतिशत रह गई है। मुख्यमंत्री ने कहा कि जसपुर में बड़ी संख्या में किसान गन्ने की खेती करते हैं। सभी किसानों की आर्थिक समृद्धि के लिए हमारी सरकार ने इस वर्ष गन्ना रेट में 20 रुपए/क्विंटल की वृद्धि की है। आज यहां की चीनी मिल में ब्वायलरों के अपग्रेडेशन का भी शिलान्यास किया है। उन्होंने कहा कि दो दिन पहले ही हमने किसानों के कल्याण को ध्यान में रखते हुए एक महत्वपूर्ण निर्णय लिया है। हमारी सरकार ने नहर के पानी को किसानों के लिए टैक्स फ्री कर दिया है। अब नहर से सिंचाई करने वाले किसानों को कोई शुल्क नहीं देना पड़ेगा, किसान मुफ्त में नहर से सिंचाई करेंगे। मुख्यमंत्री ने जनकल्याणकारी योजनाओं से लाभान्वित होने वाले लाभार्थियों एवं स्वयं सहायता समूह की कोमल से वार्ता की। वार्ता के दौरान लाभार्थियों ने मुख्यमंत्री का आभार प्रकट करते हुए धन्यवाद दिया। इसी क्रम में ग्राम्य विकास समूह के लाभार्थियों को 17 करोड़ 24 लाख, सहकारिता विभाग के लाभार्थियों को 13 करोड़ 92 लाख व स्वास्थ्य विभाग के 3 आयुष्मान कार्ड, खाद्य विभाग के 2 लाभार्थियों को उज्ज्वला किट वितरित किए गए। गढ़ी नेगी को नगर पंचायत एवं कालाढूंगी को नगर पंचायत से नगर पालिका बनाने पर क्षेत्रीयवासियो द्वारा मुख्यमंत्री का आभार व्यक्त किया। इसी के साथ जसपुर के हिडिम्बा मंदिर के सौंदर्यीकरण के लिए मंदिर समिति के सदस्य व क्षेत्रवासियों ने मुख्यमंत्री का आभार व्यक्त किया। - Advertisement - Sign Up For Daily Newsletter Be keep up! All Rights Reserved. htbreaking > Blog > Home > जसपुर पहुंचे सीएम धामी, 7 विकास योजनाओं का किया शिलान्यास एवं लोकार्पण… Home जसपुर पहुंचे सीएम धामी, 7 विकास योजनाओं का किया शिलान्यास एवं लोकार्पण… Published March 15, 2024 Home 4 Min Read Share 4 Min Read SHARE मुख्यमंत्री पुष्कर सिंह धामी आज जसपुर कृषि उत्पादन मंडी समिति में आयोजित लाभार्थी सम्मान समारोह में शामिल हुए। कार्यक्रम में मुख्यमंत्री का गीत, नृत्य व पुष्प वर्षा से जोरदार स्वागत किया गया। मुख्यमंत्री ने भी जनता पर पुष्प वर्षा कर उनका धन्यवाद किया। मुख्यमंत्री ने 28.20 करोड़ रू. की 7 विकास योजनाओं का शिलान्यास एवं लोकार्पण किया। जिसमें नगर पालिका परिषद, जसपुर के मुख्यालय के नए भवन का निर्माण कार्य, खटीमा के अंतर्गत बनखण्डी मंदिर, चकरपुर के सौंदर्यीकरण, नादेही चीनी मिल के बॉयलरों का अपग्रेडेशन का कार्य भी शामिल है। इसके अलावा 0.8267 करोड़ रुपए की लागत से जसपुर के अंतर्गत ग्राम हलदुवासाहू में हिडिम्बा देवी मंदिर का सौंदर्यीकरण का कार्य, 12 करोड़ किच्छा चीनी मिल के लघु आधुनिकीकरण, 1.69 करोड़ रूपए की लागत से जल जीवन मिशन के अंतर्गत पेयजल निर्माण कार्य का लोकार्पण भी शामिल हैं। मुख्यमंत्री ने जसपुर के डाम क्षेत्र के उच्चतर माध्यमिक विद्यालय के उच्चीकरण एवं जसपुर के अधिवक्ताओं के लिए चेंबर के निर्माण की घोषणा की। इसके बाद मुख्यमंत्री ने आयुष विभाग, समाज कल्याण विभाग, पर्यटन विभाग एवं उद्योग विभाग द्वारा लगाए गए विभिन्न स्टॉलों का भी निरीक्षण किया। उन्होंने कहा कि जसपुर के चहुंमुखी विकास को लेकर हमारी सरकार पूरी तरह से संकल्पित है। जब वे पिछली बार यहां आए थे तो 16.5 करोड़ रुपए के विकास कार्यों का लोकार्पण एवं शिलान्यास किया था। इसके साथ ही विभिन्न रोजगार मेलों के जरिए युवाओं को रोजगार दिलाया जा रहा है। उन्होंने कहा कि वर्ष 2021-22 में बेरोजगारी दर 8.4 प्रतिशत थी जो वर्ष 2022-23 में घटकर 4.9 प्रतिशत रह गई है। मुख्यमंत्री ने कहा कि जसपुर में बड़ी संख्या में किसान गन्ने की खेती करते हैं। सभी किसानों की आर्थिक समृद्धि के लिए हमारी सरकार ने इस वर्ष गन्ना रेट में 20 रुपए/क्विंटल की वृद्धि की है। आज यहां की चीनी मिल में ब्वायलरों के अपग्रेडेशन का भी शिलान्यास किया है। उन्होंने कहा कि दो दिन पहले ही हमने किसानों के कल्याण को ध्यान में रखते हुए एक महत्वपूर्ण निर्णय लिया है। हमारी सरकार ने नहर के पानी को किसानों के लिए टैक्स फ्री कर दिया है। अब नहर से सिंचाई करने वाले किसानों को कोई शुल्क नहीं देना पड़ेगा, किसान मुफ्त में नहर से सिंचाई करेंगे। मुख्यमंत्री ने जनकल्याणकारी योजनाओं से लाभान्वित होने वाले लाभार्थियों एवं स्वयं सहायता समूह की कोमल से वार्ता की। वार्ता के दौरान लाभार्थियों ने मुख्यमंत्री का आभार प्रकट करते हुए धन्यवाद दिया। इसी क्रम में ग्राम्य विकास समूह के लाभार्थियों को 17 करोड़ 24 लाख, सहकारिता विभाग के लाभार्थियों को 13 करोड़ 92 लाख व स्वास्थ्य विभाग के 3 आयुष्मान कार्ड, खाद्य विभाग के 2 लाभार्थियों को उज्ज्वला किट वितरित किए गए। गढ़ी नेगी को नगर पंचायत एवं कालाढूंगी को नगर पंचायत से नगर पालिका बनाने पर क्षेत्रीयवासियो द्वारा मुख्यमंत्री का आभार व्यक्त किया। इसी के साथ जसपुर के हिडिम्बा मंदिर के सौंदर्यीकरण के लिए मंदिर समिति के सदस्य व क्षेत्रवासियों ने मुख्यमंत्री का आभार व्यक्त किया। - Advertisement - Sign Up For Daily Newsletter Be keep up! paragraph: होटल में करंट से कर्मचारी की मौत, मुआवजे की मांग पर हेलिपैड पर धरना | Hotel Employee Electrocuted To Death Protest At Helipad Demanding Compensation 5 मार्च 2026, गुरुवार ताजा खबरें राज्य T-20 World Cup US Israel-Iran War पत्रिका स्पेशल कुलिश जन्मशती वर्ष राष्ट्रीय बिजनेस मनोरंजन धर्म स्वास्थ्य खेल राजनीति विश्व शिक्षा ओपिनियन टेक ऑटोमोबाइल लाइफस्टाइल शॉर्ट्स वीडियोज़ फोटो गैलरी ई-पेपर मेरी खबर शॉर्ट्स ई-पेपर सवाई माधोपुर होटल में करंट से कर्मचारी की मौत, मुआवजे की मांग पर हेलिपैड पर धरना Sawai Madhopur News: सवाई माधोपुर के रणथंभौर क्षेत्र में होटल कर्मचारी की करंट से मौत के बाद परिजनों ने सड़क जाम कर मुआवजा और कार्रवाई की मांग की। जानिए पूरा मामला। less than 1 minute read सवाई माधोपुर • Himesh Rana • Mar 02, 2026 फोटो- AI Sawai Madhopur News: सवाई माधोपुर के रणथंभौर क्षेत्र स्थित एक होटल में काम कर रहे कर्मचारी की करंट लगने से मौत हो गई। जानकारी के अनुसार हरिकेश मीणा (32) हाउसकीपिंग का कार्य करता था। रविवार शाम वह होटल में बिजली से जुड़े काम के दौरान करंट की चपेट में आ गया, जिससे उसकी मौके पर ही मौत हो गई। घटना की सूचना मिलते ही होटल प्रबंधन ने पुलिस और परिजनों को जानकारी दी और शव को जिला अस्पताल की मोर्चरी में रखवाया गया। परिजनों और ग्रामीणों का विरोध प्रदर्शन घटना के बाद सोमवार सुबह परिजन और ग्रामीण आक्रोशित हो गए। लोगों ने शेरपुर तिराहे पर सड़क जाम कर दिया, जिससे कुछ समय के लिए यातायात प्रभावित रहा। बाद में प्रदर्शनकारी कुंडेरा-सवाई माधोपुर मार्ग पर हेलीपैड के पास धरने पर बैठ गए और प्रशासन के खिलाफ नारेबाजी की। लापरवाही का आरोप, मुआवजे की मांग प्रदर्शन कर रहे परिजनों ने होटल प्रबंधन पर लापरवाही का आरोप लगाया है। उनका कहना है कि सुरक्षा व्यवस्था में कमी के कारण हादसा हुआ। परिजन मृतक के परिवार के लिए उचित मुआवजा और जिम्मेदारों के खिलाफ सख्त कार्रवाई की मांग पर अड़े हुए हैं। प्रशासन मौके पर, समझाइश जारी सूचना मिलने पर पुलिस और प्रशासनिक अधिकारी मौके पर पहुंचे। अधिकारियों ने प्रदर्शनकारियों से बातचीत कर मामला शांत कराने का प्रयास किया। प्रशासन का कहना है कि मामले की जांच की जा रही है और नियमानुसार कार्रवाई की जाएगी। खबर शेयर करें: Join Arovia on ने पत्थर दिल इंसान को भी रुला दिया सवाई माधोपुर Gangapur City: मातम में बदली होली की खुशियां, टंकी में मिले 3 मासूमों के शव, मां ने ट्रेन के आगे कूदकर दी जान; सहमा पूरा गांव सवाई माधोपुर DOWNLOAD ON व्यवस्था में कमी के कारण हादसा हुआ। परिजन मृतक के परिवार के लिए उचित मुआवजा और जिम्मेदारों के खिलाफ सख्त कार्रवाई की मांग पर अड़े हुए हैं। प्रशासन मौके पर, समझाइश जारी सूचना मिलने पर पुलिस और प्रशासनिक अधिकारी मौके पर पहुंचे। अधिकारियों ने प्रदर्शनकारियों से बातचीत कर मामला शांत कराने का प्रयास किया। प्रशासन का कहना है कि मामले की जांच की जा रही है और नियमानुसार कार्रवाई की जाएगी। खबर शेयर एग्रीकल्चर ऑटो टेक Menu चुनाव 2024 राष्ट्रीय अन्तर्राष्ट्रीय करियर कारोबार आस्था खेल क्राइम एग्रीकल्चर ऑटो टेक E-Paper LATEST NEWS रैफल्स विश्वविद्यालय, नीमराना में वीकेजी मेमोरियल स्पोर्ट्स मीट का आयोजन रैफल्स विश्वविद्यालय में राष्ट्रीय महिला दिवस का आयोजन बेटियों के सम्मान में उमंग उत्सव: काठ का माजरा और मोलाडिया में सम्मान समारोह का आयोजन बालिका दिवस पर शुरू हुई “उमंग उत्सव” पहल: नगर कांग्रेस अध्यक्ष वेद प्रकाश सैनी द्वारा बेटियों के जन्म दिवस को बनाया जा रहा सम्मान का अवसर MARUDHARHIND NEWS Download E-Paper चुनाव 2024 राष्ट्रीय अन्तर्राष्ट्रीय करियर कारोबार आस्था खेल क्राइम मनोरंजन ट्रेंडिंग एग्रीकल्चर एनसीआर में आतिशबाज़ी पर पूरी तरह पाबंदी, राजस्थान सरकार का बड़ा फैसला By Marudhar Hind News / June 3, 2025 अब साल भर नहीं चल सकेंगे पटाखे, उल्लंघन पर सख्त कार्रवाई का अलर्ट जयपुर। बढ़ते प्रदूषण और सुप्रीम कोर्ट के निर्देशों के मद्देनज़र राजस्थान सरकार ने एनसीआर क्षेत्र में पटाखों के जलाने, निर्माण, भंडारण, बिक्री और वितरण पर पूरी तरह से स्थायी प्रतिबंध लगाने का बड़ा फैसला लिया है। यह आदेश अलवर, भरतपुर, डीग, खैरथल-तिजारा के साथ साथ कोटपुतली-बहरोड़ जिले में तत्काल प्रभाव से लागू कर दिया गया है। पर्यावरण एवं जलवायु परिवर्तन विभाग द्वारा जारी निर्देशों के अनुसार, यह निर्णय सुप्रीम कोर्ट के उस आदेश के अनुपालन में लिया गया है जिसमें दिल्ली और हरियाणा सरकारों को पहले ही ऑनलाइन व ऑफलाइन माध्यम से पटाखों की बिक्री पर रोक लगाने को कहा गया था। अब कोर्ट ने उत्तर प्रदेश और राजस्थान को भी दो सप्ताह के भीतर इस पर सख्त अनुपालन रिपोर्ट दाखिल करने के आदेश दिए हैं। राजस्थान सरकार ने एनसीआर क्षेत्र में सालभर के लिए पटाखों से जुड़ी हर गतिविधि पर रोक लगाते हुए स्पष्ट किया है कि— कोई भी व्यक्ति या संस्था पटाखे जला, बना, बेच या संग्रहीत नहीं कर सकेगी, चाहे वह ऑनलाइन हो या ऑफलाइन। जिलाधिकारियों व पुलिस अधीक्षकों को कड़ी निगरानी के निर्देश दिए गए हैं, और किसी भी उल्लंघन पर सख्त कार्रवाई की चेतावनी दी गई है। इस प्रतिबंध के प्रचार-प्रसार के लिए प्रिंट, इलेक्ट्रॉनिक और सोशल मीडिया के जरिए अभियान चलाने का निर्देश दिया गया है। साथ ही, जनता की शिकायतों के लिए शिकायत निवारण प्रणाली (Grievance Redress Mechanism) स्थापित की जाएगी। विशेष सचिव सुदीप कौर द्वारा जारी आदेश में यह भी कहा गया है कि संबंधित अधिकारी इस आदेश का कड़ाई से पालन सुनिश्चित करें, ताकि वायु प्रदूषण की चुनौती से प्रभावी तरीके से निपटा जा सके। Post navigation ← Previous Post Next Post → Related Posts रूस से क्या है ISIS खुरासान की दुश्मनी, क्या व्लादिमीर पुतिन की नीति है जिम्मेदार? India-Pakistan Relations: पाकिस्तान की निकल गई हेकड़ी, अब भारत से लगा रहा गुहार Maldives: मुइज्जू ‘अड़ियल’ रुख छोडें… भारत से विवाद पर अपने ही देश में घिरते जा रहे मालदीव के राष्ट्रपति चीनी को देखते ही लगते हैं मारने, जानें कौन है मजीद ब्रिगेड? नाम सुनते ही पाकिस्तान का खौल जाता है खून India Pakistan Trade: भारत-पाकिस्तान के साथ फिर से शुरू होगा कारोबार? विदेश मंत्री डार के बयान से उठा सवाल China on Arunachal Pradesh: अरुणाचल पर सामने आया सच तो बिलबिला गया ड्रैगन, भारत के बाद अमेरिका पर निकाली भड़ास Search for: Subscribe to our MarudharHind News for daily Newsletter Email Subscribe Follow Us Facebook X-twitter Youtube Instagram About Us Disclaimer Advertise With Us Contact Us Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Copyright © 2025 Marudharhind News| Designed By Abhastra Technology

Il Patrimonio dell'Umanit� dell'Unesco raccontato da Mauro Cavalieri Il Mondo di Mauro & Lisi IL PATRIMONIO DELL'UMANITA' DELL'UNESCO di Mauro Fin da quando ero piccolo e andavo a scuola l'UNESCO risvegliava in me i pi� grandi ideali. Il primo ad avermene parlato � stato mio padre, Ruggero Cavalieri. Un giorno, mentre visitavamo i Fori Romani, mi disse che nel 1972 i Popoli uniti della Terra aveva deciso di tutelare i siti pi� belli del mondo, fossero essi stati di importanza culturale o naturale, e che il Centro storico di Roma era stato uno dei primi luoghi ad essere stato inserito nella Lista. Di cosa stava parlando? Del Patrimonio dell'Umanit� dell'UNESCO. Che cosa bella... risposi completamente affascinato e nostro padre mi raccont� anche che tutti noi, e non solo l'UNESCO, eravamo chiamati a rispettare, tutelare e difendere questo Patrimonio meraviglioso che il passato ci ha tramandato, perch� proprio perch� � "dell'Umanit�" appartiene ad ognuno di noi. All'epoca Lisi era appena nata ed io ero un adolescente con tanti ideali e molti sogni. Da allora ne � passata di acqua sotto i ponti, ma anche se nostro padre ormai non c'� pi�, le sue parole sono scolpite nel mio cuore come se me le avesse ripetute questa mattina prima di andare a lavoro. Nel frattempo io mi sono laureato con lode in Scienze Politiche con una tesi proprio sul Patrimonio dell'Umanit� ed ho incontrato Augusto Di Belardino, il mio superiore all'UNESCO Italia. Dopo cinque anni passati come tuttofare ecco che arriva la mia agognata promozione: sono diventato Ispettore UNESCO. Ogni volta che succede qualcosa ad uno di questi siti sparsi per il mondo posso partire per cercare di fronteggiare i pericoli e proteggere il nostro Patrimonio. Avevo realizzato il sogno della mia vita... Voi forse vi state chiedendo perch� mi sia sempre identificato in questa istituzione. La risposta � semplice. L'UNESCO rispecchia i valori che mi hanno tramandato i miei genitori. Mi piace chi si batte per dare un futuro al nostro passato. Chi comprende che per andare avanti deve conoscere e rispettare le nostre radici. Chi tutela un patrimonio che proprio perch� � cos� prezioso appartiene a tutti noi. Ed io sono felice di poter fare qualcosa di concreto per contribuire alla salvaguardia di questa eredit� comune. I siti inseriti nel Patrimonio dell'Umanit� sono ad oggi, giugno 2011, 936 (di cui 725 culturali, 183 naturali e 28 misti), ma ogni anno la Lista si infittisce di nuovi luoghi (alcuni molto famosi, altri quasi sconosciuti) che hanno tante storie da raccontarci. Come sono nati, cosa hanno vissuto, perch� sono in pericolo. L'Italia, con 47 siti inseriti, � il Paese al mondo che ha pi� siti nella Lista (il 5% del totale). Per entrare a far parte del Patrimonio dell'Umanit� la procedura � un po' lunga. Le amministrazioni locali devono preparare dei complessi dossier in cui specificano che i siti proposti rispondo ai vari criteri di eleggibilit� decisi dall'UNESCO. Una volta vagliati i documenti, l'UNESCO visita i luoghi e se d� l'assenso definitivo, il sito viene inserito nella Lista. Da l� inizia l'avventura di cui tutti noi siamo i protagonisti. Come avrete capito, quindi, questi siti appartengono pure a voi e se volete sapere qualcosa di pi� sulle meraviglie che vi circondano cliccate qui e scoprirete i luoghi pi� belli della nostra Terra (il sito � solo in inglese o francese). Se invece volete sapere di pi� sull'UNESCO Italia e conoscere le sue iniziative cliccate qui (ma non cercate di me. Sono Ispettore e devo viaggiare in incognito). Il logo della serie disegnato da NIM � 2007 Il mondo di Mauro & Lisi web master: Lisi & Co.
